ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', OR( INCLUDES(Product_Type__c, 'Professional Indemnity'), INCLUDES(Product_Type__c, 'IR35 Standalone') ), Renewal_Date_not_Given__c = False, OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Non_Auto_Renewal_Opportunity', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Customer_Opportunity' ), OR( ISBLANK(Current_Renewal_Date__c), ISBLANK(Competitor_Renewal_Date__c) ), OR(ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Qualification'), ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Closed Won'), ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Closed Lost') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV8: Please confirm that a Renewal Date has not been provided
